name: Permafrost
startIntroPart1: There is only one rule to follow.
startIntroPart2: Expand the permafrost and it shall reward you.
declaringWar: I shall freeze you to death!
attacked: You dare to defy nature itself?
introduction: Greetings. I am Yusidora, the frozen witch of winter. Do you like snow?
neutralHello: May the cold be with you.
neutralNo: I am sorry you can only offer this much.'
neutralYes: This is not that good, but I shall accept it.'
hateHello: May the cold be with you.
hateNo: This does not pleases me. Begone!'
hateYes: It does not seems like a have a choice, anyways.
tradeRequest: The frozen lands have many treasures. Would you like some?
declaringfriendship: Be grateful, for I will allow you to be my friend.
uniqueText:
May not annex cities 
 Cannot build Settlers 
 Can only build on Nevermeltice tiles. 
 Can create Nevermeltice tiles 
-100% Food consumption in capital 
-1 Movement for Enemy units inside your territory
uniques: Enemy [All] units must spend [1] extra movement points when inside your territory <in [Nevermeltice] tiles> <Suppress warning [*contains a conditional on a unit movement unique*]>
